Description of AI Tool Usage: Used ChatGPT to brainstorm ways to turn an LLM chatbot into an actual video games.
Output: Suggested a health bar, point system, and a 3 suspect interogation mechanic, as well as other stuff.
Integration and Rationale: Yes,Partially. Selected the interogation idea. I integrated other ideas like the ticking clock into my JS to force players to manage their questions carefully.
Challenges Considered: Ensured the clock math (3 in-game mins per question) didn't overly complicate the API routing.

Description of AI Tool Usage: I used Gemini to generate the CSS of my app.
Output: Generated part of the CSS that i would add each time.
Integration and Rationale: Yes, some of it. When i tested some stuff was good, some stuff needed a lot of twicking, wich i did. Because i implemented stuff piece by piece, some things weren't well related to each other.
Challenges Considered: Making sure everything follows the same style and pattern, and nothing overlaps itself.

Description of AI Tool Usage: Asked AI why my @keyframes pendulum animation for the interrogation room light was causing page scrollbars.
Output: AI suggested using overflow-x: hidden on the body and adjusting transform-origin.
Integration and Rationale: Yes. Applied the CSS fix to styles.css. This saved me hours of manual CSS trial and error.
Challenges Considered: Had to manually tweak the vh and pixel values to make sure the light fit my specific UI layout.

Description of AI Tool Usage: I asked IA to brainstorm and give idea for how I should do the architecture of the static folder, as well as the bases for the files inside
Output: Gave me general guidelines for the files inside static, so the HTML and JS, as well as idea for the functions.
Integration and Rationale: Partially. Some ideas were good, but some files were just unneceseray, and others were not the way of implementing I had in mind.
Challenges Considered: A lot of functions just didn't go together so I had to write some parts from scratch. And tweek some python stuff

Description of AI Tool Usage: Used AI to generate the boilerplate syntax for replacing plain-text passwords with the modern bcrypt library because the previous library wasn't working
Output: Provided Python helper functions for hashpw and checkpw without using the outdated passlib context.
Integration and Rationale: Yes. Integrated into main.py and database.py to have the strict security.
Challenges Considered: Realized existing plain-text test accounts broke; had to write a script to wipe and re-initialize the DB securely.

Description of AI Tool Usage: I used AI to help me translate the introduction brief into english.
Output: Generated the Captain Miller briefing text and ending scenarios.
Integration and Rationale: Yes. Added to interrogation.js for the typewriter overlay to have better cinematic feel for the game.
Challenges Considered: I edited the output a lot to make sure it specifically referenced my exact 3-hour time limit mechanic, as well as reduced lenght in some places.

Description of AI Tool Usage: I asked IA to write me a first draft for the README, as well as plans for the points i could write in the A B C and D docx.
Output: Generate a first README draft as well as general guidelines for what I could write in the docx.
Integration and Rationale: No and yes. The README was very bad, so it took a bit of time before i got something descent, and then there still was a lot to modify. For the docx, the guidelines were very vague and didn't really help me out, so it wasn't really helpful either
Challenges Considered: Writing all the docx was a lot, and it was sometimes hard not to repeat myslef, or to put on paper what I had in mind with clear wording.
